objective: Export the SdkWorkflowProgress type from src/types/tools.ts for SDK task progress event boundaries.
changes: Added a narrow SdkWorkflowProgress interface with optional workflow identity, phase, timing, status, and error fields.
Used an unknown-valued extension index so reconstructed workflow progress deltas remain tolerant without using broad any.

verification.notes: The src/utils/sdkEventQueue.ts and src/utils/task/sdkProgress.ts TS2305 diagnostics for SdkWorkflowProgress no longer appear in the tsc log.

next_candidates: Add targeted internal-only module declarations for protectedNamespace and attributionTrailer.
Add targeted internal-only module declarations for TerminalCaptureTool prompt and VerifyPlanExecutionTool constants.
Add targeted internal-only module declarations for peerSessions and workerAgent.
